==Supreme Warlord==
[[File:Supreme Warlord.png|100px|left|alt=Supreme Warlord]]
Summon Lu Bu when the battle begins!

1. Raise [[Cathay INTEL#Shu|Shu INTEL tile 18]] to level 3

2. Complete each special incident

3. Raise [[Cathay INTEL#Shu|Shu INTEL tile 19]] to level 1
{{clear}}

{{RewardIconWithText|Supreme Warlord}} is the [[Realm Traits|Realm Trait]] for [[Cathay]].

When first obtained in [[Cathay]], the {{RewardIconWithText|Supreme Warlord}} will, alongside contributing his own base stats to a fight: for every 20 Snail HP, General Lu Bu HP +4; for every 20 Snail ATK, General Lu Bu ATK +17; For every 20 Snail DEF, General Lu Bu DEF +15, and; Restores full HP after combat. This is at maximum (level 30), and after this the {{RewardIconWithText|Supreme Warlord}} can  be unsealed with {{RewardIconWithLink|Magic Potion}}. Supreme Warlord, more commonly called Lu Bu, is great for short and difficult fights. Any fights that are anticipated to be 5 rounds or less should be fought with Lu Bu. Therefore he's perfect for dominating remaining realm apostles. 

===Upgrade Materials===
There are four items required to upgrade Lu Bu: {{RewardIconWithText|Byakko Spirit}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Genbu Spirit}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Seiryuu Spirit}}, and {{RewardIconWithText|Suzaku Spirit}}. Spirits are obtained while upgrading [[Cathay Generals]] to max (Tier 9). Each spirit can come from 7 different Generals (x3) which comes out to 21 total spirits from Generals. Alos, upgrading the relevent [[Cathay INTEL]] tiles will increase the chance of spirits dropping during regular exploration. In total, 30 spirits are needed. 

{| class="wikitable"
!Spirit
!Kingdom of Wei
!Kingdom of Shu
!Kingdom of Wu
!Warlord Generals
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Byakko Spirit}}
|Lady Zhen
|Madam Huang<br>Useless Liu Shan
|Qiao Sisters
|Kiddo Kong Rong<br>Charming Diao Chan<br>Healer Hua Tuo
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Genbu Spirit}}
|Guard Dian Wei<br>Vanguard Zhang Liao
|Super Ma Chao
|Warscar Zhou Tai<br>Gallant Huang Gai
|Chief Meng Huo<br>Master Zuo Ci
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Seiryuu Spirit}}
|Minister Cao Cao
|Stalwart Zhao Yun<br>Brawler Zhang Fei
|Princess Sun<br>Lord Sun Quan
|Rebel Zhang Jiao<br>Warlord Dong Zhuo
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Suzaku Spirit}}
|Cyclops Xiahou D<br>Counselor Guo Jia<br>Strategist Sima Yi
|Faithful Guan Yu<br>Adviser Zhuge
|Admiral Zhou Yu<br>Taoist Yu Ji
|
|}

==Stats==
{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!rowspan="2"|Level
!rowspan="2"|{{RewardIconWithText|Prestige}} Cost
!colspan="4"|Effect on Lu Bu
|-
!{{RewardIconWithText|Byakko Spirit}}
!{{RewardIconWithText|Genbu Spirit}}
!{{RewardIconWithText|Seiryuu Spirit}}
!{{RewardIconWithText|Suzaku Spirit}}
|-
|1
|100
|HP +60
|ATK +25
|DEF +10
|Ignore DEF +1%
|-
|2
|120
|HP +120
|ATK +50
|DEF +20
|Ignore DEF +2%
|-
|3
|160
|HP +180
|ATK +75
|DEF +30
|Ignore DEF +3%
|-
|4
|250
|HP +240
|ATK +100
|DEF +40
|Ignore DEF +4%
|-
|5
|350
|HP +300
|ATK +125
|DEF +50
|Ignore DEF +5%
|-
|6
|500
|HP +360
|ATK +150
|DEF +60
|Ignore DEF +6%
|-
|7
|700
|HP +420
|ATK +175
|DEF +70
|Ignore DEF +7%
|-
|8
|900
|HP +480
|ATK +200
|DEF +80
|Ignore DEF +8%
|-
|9
|1,100
|HP +540
|ATK +225
|DEF +90
|Ignore DEF +9%
|-
|10
|1,300
|HP +600
|ATK +250
|DEF +100
|Ignore DEF +10%
|-
|11
|1,600
|HP +660
|ATK +275
|DEF +110
|Ignore DEF +11%
|-
|12
|1,900
|HP +720
|ATK +300
|DEF +120
|Ignore DEF +12%
|-
|13
|2,200
|HP +780
|ATK +325
|DEF +130
|Ignore DEF +13%
|-
|14
|2,500
|HP +840
|ATK +350
|DEF +140
|Ignore DEF +14%
|-
|15
|3,000
|HP +900
|ATK +375
|DEF +150
|Ignore DEF +15%
|-
|16
|3,500
|HP +960
|ATK +400
|DEF +160
|Ignore DEF +16%
|-
|17
|4,000
|HP +1,020
|ATK +425
|DEF +170
|Ignore DEF +17%
|-
|18
|4,500
|HP +1,080
|ATK +450
|DEF +180
|Ignore DEF +18%
|-
|19
|5,000
|HP +1,140
|ATK +475
|DEF +190
|Ignore DEF +19%
|-
|20
|5,600
|HP +1,200
|ATK +500
|DEF +200
|Ignore DEF +20%
|-
|21
|6,200
|HP +1,260
|ATK +525
|DEF +210
|Ignore DEF +21%
|-
|22
|6,800
|HP +1,320
|ATK +550
|DEF +220
|Ignore DEF +22%
|-
|23
|7,500
|HP +1,380
|ATK +575
|DEF +230
|Ignore DEF +23%
|-
|24
|8,200
|HP +1,440
|ATK +600
|DEF +240
|Ignore DEF +24%
|-
|25
|8,800
|HP +1,500
|ATK +625
|DEF +250
|Ignore DEF +25%
|-
|26
|9,600
|HP +1,560
|ATK +650
|DEF +260
|Ignore DEF +26%
|-
|27
|10,400
|HP +1,620
|ATK +675
|DEF +270
|Ignore DEF +27%
|-
|28
|11,200
|HP +1,680
|ATK +700
|DEF +280
|Ignore DEF +28%
|-
|29
|12,000
|HP +1,740
|ATK +725
|DEF +290
|Ignore DEF +29%
|-
|30
|13,000
|HP +1,800
|ATK +750
|DEF +300
|Ignore DEF +30%
|}

==Unsealing==
Once the {{RewardIconWithText|Supreme Warlord}} has been upgraded to the max level (30), you have the option to Unseal the Spirit trapped inside. Doing this costs 300 {{RewardIconWithLink|Magic Potion}}. 

Unsealing releases the Spirit of Ding Yuan, who will gift you {{RewardIconWithLink|Incense, +1|orange}} and {{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +6h}} as a thank you. 

Upgrading Spirit of Ding Yuan is quite expensive, but doing so gives permanent buffs to your snail. 
{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
! rowspan="2" |Tier
! rowspan="2" |{{RewardIconWithText|Magic Potion}} Cost
! rowspan="2" |{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}} Cost
! colspan="4" |Cumulative effect, or
|-
!HP +
!ATK +
!DEF +
!RUSH +
|-
|T1
|
|
|200
|40
|20
|20
|-
|T2
|100
|4k
|400
|80
|40
|40
|-
|T3
|110
|6k
|600
|120
|60
|60
|-
|T4
|120
|8k
|800
|160
|80
|80
|-
|T5
|130
|10k
| colspan="4" style="text-align:center" |General Lu Bu ATK +6%
|-
|T6
|150
|12k
|1100
|220
|110
|110
|-
|T7
|170
|14k
|1400
|280
|140
|140
|-
|T8
|190
|16k
|1700
|340
|170
|170
|-
|T9
|210
|18k
|2000
|400
|200
|200
|-
|T10
|230
|20k
| colspan="4" style="text-align:center" |General Lu Bu DEF +6%
|-
|T11
|260
|22k
|2400
|480
|240
|240
|-
|T12
|290
|24k
|2800
|560
|280
|280
|-
|T13
|320
|26k
|3200
|640
|320
|320
|-
|T14
|350
|28k
|3600
|720
|360
|360
|-
|T15
|380
|30k
| colspan="4" style="text-align:center" |General Lu Bu CRIT +6%
|-
|T16
|420
|32k
|4100
|820
|410
|410
|-
|T17
|460
|34k
|4600
|920
|460
|460
|-
|T18
|500
|36k
|5100
|1020
|510
|510
|-
|T19
|540
|38k
|5600
|1120
|560
|560
|-
|T20
|580
|40k
| colspan="4" style="text-align:center" |General Lu Bu CRIT DMG +60%
|-
|T21
|630
|42k
|6200
|1240
|620
|620
|-
|T22
|680
|44k
|6800
|1360
|680
|680
|-
|T23
|730
|46k
|7400
|1480
|740
|740
|-
|T24
|780
|48k
|8000
|1600
|800
|800
|-
|T25
|830
|50k
| colspan="4" style="text-align:center" |General Lu Bu ATK +18%
|-
|T26
|890
|52k
|8800
|1760
|880
|880
|-
|T27
|950
|54k
|9600
|1920
|960
|960
|-
|T28
|1010
|56k
|10400
|2080
|1040
|1040
|-
|T29
|1070
|58k
|11200
|2240
|1120
|1120
|-
|T30
|1130
|60k
| colspan="4" style="text-align:center" |General Lu Bu DEF +18%
|-
|T31
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|T32
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|T33
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|T34
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|T35
|
|
| colspan="4" style="text-align:center" |General Lu Bu CRIT +18%
|-
|T36
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|T37
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|T38
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|T39
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|T40
|
|
| colspan="4" style="text-align:center" |General Lu Bu CRIT DMG +180%
|}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Realm]]
[[Category:Cathay]]
[[Category:Realm Trait]]
